parameters.name: useaudio
parameters.description: Use audio narration for instructions (recommended for children)

parameters.name: pileoffset
parameters.description: Distance from upper corners for target card piles (in pixels)

parameters.name: alwaysdobordertest
parameters.description: Always proceed to border (advanced) test regardless of shape test performance

parameters.name: neverdobordertest
parameters.description: Never do border (advanced) test - only color and shape games
